message:
fix(core): correct ribosome TASEP + stabilize simulations

- translation-simulation: update ribosome positions in 3\x27->5\x27 order (oldest to newest) so leaders move freely and exclusion is enforced correctly; adjust the unit test to cover the expected update order.
- simulation-implementations: make plaque diffusion toroidal (wrap-around) and fix bounce logic to avoid overwriting occupied cells; normalize infection-kinetics parameters to per-second units for consistent dt handling.
- simulation metadata: simplify the packaging motor display name.

files.patch:
@@ -363,7 +363,7 @@ export const SIMULATION_METADATA: SimulationMeta[] = [
   },
   {
     id: 'packaging-motor',
-    name: 'Packaging Motor Pressure',
+    name: 'Packaging Motor',
     description: 'Feel the 60 atmospheres building in the capsid',
     icon: '📦',
     priority: 5,
